methodology_notes: The skill's Step 1 git diff command was executed manually, NOT by a separate agent instance with the skill loaded.

assertions.description: No screenshot files are committed when no dashboards are affected
assertions.evidence: No screenshot files exist. The evaluator ran the skill's Step 1 check, found no dashboard changes, and stopped.

assertions.description: Agent explicitly states that no dashboards are affected by the changes
assertions.evidence: No actual agent was run. Cannot evaluate agent communication behavior.

notes: Manual command execution. C2 cannot be evaluated without running an actual agent.
